example_failures.question: What are the top 5 best-selling products by quantity in completed orders?
example_failures.generated_sql:
SELECT p.product_name 
FROM products p 
JOIN order_items oi ON p.product_id = oi.product_id 
JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id 
WHERE o.status = 'completed' 
GROUP BY p.product_name 
ORDER BY SUM(oi.quantity) DESC 
LIMIT 5

results.question: Which 5 product categories generated the most revenue from completed orders?
results.gold_sql: SELECT p.category, SUM(oi.line_total) rev FROM order_items oi JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id=o.order_id JOIN products p ON oi.product_id=p.product_id WHERE o.status='completed' GROUP BY p.category ORDER BY rev DESC LIMIT 5;
results.generated_sql:
SELECT p.category, SUM(oi.line_total) AS total_revenue
FROM products p
JOIN order_items oi ON p.product_id = oi.product_id
JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id
JOIN payments pmt ON o.order_id = pmt.order_id
WHERE o.status = 'completed' AND pmt.status = 'paid'
GROUP BY p.category
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 5
results.reason: Rows match in order
